notes: Short self-contained file (123 lines, 4 declarations) establishing surjectivity and bijectivity of the geometric Frobenius point map over the algebraic closure. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, all proofs are at most 18 lines. The file is a clean building-block: it imports only FrobeniusFixedPoint and exports three theorems used downstream by other WeilPairing files.
